content: I am Sanjay Verma, retired clerk from the same department. I was present as an independent witness during the ACB trap on 12.10.2023. I was seated in the waiting area outside Mr. Kumar’s cabin. I saw Mr. Arjun Mehta enter the cabin at 3:15 PM. He handed over a white envelope to Mr. Ramesh Kumar. Mr. Kumar took it, placed it in his inner shirt pocket, and said something like 'Kal tak mil jayega.' I did not see anyone else enter or exit the cabin before or after. The ACB officers entered within 90 seconds. I confirm that the money was handed directly by Mr. Mehta to Mr. Kumar. I have no reason to lie. I have known Mr. Kumar for 12 years — he is a quiet man, but I’ve heard rumors about him asking for money. I stand by my statement.
